rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PHILIP SNYDER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/31/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please explain the calculation of the statutory fee as it appears to be incorrect based on the filed I&A's. I&A's show assets of $384,918.08 + $52,053.60. Also appears the amount to be distributed is also incorrect based on the incorrect statutory fee calculation. 2) The 02/24/2022 Supplemental Declaration discusses local rule 14.67. L 6 there is no such local rule. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/23/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PAULA LIANE BISSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/13/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: If the statutory fee/commission is based on any amount other than the I&A, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. [CRC 7.705(b) and 7.550(b)(6).] The proposed distribution amount shown on page 12 appears to be incorrect. When was notice given to the Franchise Tax Board? [LRSF 14.35 I.2.] The costs advanced by the attorney include recording fees, but there was no real property in the estate. Why was notice published twice in the Chronicle? There was no need to give notice of a continued hearing. The filing fee for this petition was $435. (CourtCall costs were incurred on 3/26/21 when there was no appearance required, and appearances may be made via Zoom.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/2/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/8/22 due to full hearing calendar. In addition, the declaration filed on 4/26/22 was not verified by the petitioner (thus has not been reviewed). A filed stamped courtesy copy of the reply filed on 4/18/22 also has not been provided. All required documents to be filed and provided at least two weeks prior. Note: tentative ruling continuances are final and uncontestable and are not subject to Local Rule 14.10.B.
